title: Survival Friendly Command Block
description: This mod makes the Command Block obtainable in survival mode.
body:
![This is Survival Friendly Command Block's Banner/Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfa4ea7ffb908fb077ee5ab7845b64092088ba43.png)

"Survival Friendly Command Block" is a Minecraft mod that makes the Command Block obtainable in survival mode

**_-Made for (but not in association with the author of) Cracker's Wither Storm Mod (Not Required)-_**

# **Features:**

### _"A place in the skies"_

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- When you first load into a world, a mysterious water pillar is coming down from the skies... (x: 0 z: 0)

!["mysterious water pillar" (photographed with the Visual Vibrance shaderpack)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87357bb5e9dfe4d06aa77f80beb1d0e43a10b33b_0.webp)

- If you swim up that water pillar, you will eventually find floating islands, one of these islands contain the most powerful block in the game... **THE COMMAND BLOCK**

!["A place in the skies" (photographed with the Visual Vibrance shaderpack)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73c9964aee5afb8f5e96a9a55567239d768a5888.png)

</details>

### _"The Command Block"_

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- On that island, you will find the Command Block levitating on an Ancient Command Block Levitator (more on that later).

!["Levitating Command Block" (photographed with the Visual Vibrance shaderpack)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b962b9cceceef12f1076fda7ee91e1bb3dae2b3_0.webp)

_If you place it, how do you break it?_
- You need to forge a "Command Block Destroyer™" in a Smithing Table:

!["Command Block Destroyer™" Smithing Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad00b3a24364dd2b891d61656cd0fb6cb07f8dd1.png)

- _(Press F6 to disable warnings)_
</details>

### _"Redstone Functions"_


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- The command block can emit a redstone level of 15 if you place it on an Ancient Command Block Levitator.

!["Redstone Functions" (photographed with the Visual Vibrance shaderpack)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaa04b323aba4f9e15e216974084ad136a92e6f9_0.webp)

- Ancient Command Block Levitator Crafting Recipe:
!["Ancient Command Block Levitator" Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b26bd9b09904c63739dce4b3a47c7f3ee93bd436.png)

_why is this useful?_
- You can take away the command block and then the signal goes away.
- There is only one Command Block in the game, so if you have it, you're the only one who can activate an Ancient Command Block Levitator.
</details>

# **Cracker's Wither Storm Mod Support:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Survival Friendly Command Block is an add-on to Cracker's Wither Storm Mod, although it is not required.
  
  !["Nothing Built Can Last Forever" (photographed with the Visual Vibrance shaderpack)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2823d40f44f3ad820e64f253b85f06b95cec1fa_0.webp)

**+Feature**
- Removes all the Rundown Houses and replaces them with the Floating Ruins.
  

</details>


# _**Requires [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) and [playerAnimator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator) to work!**_
